---
title: "Lab 19 Cancer Mini-Project"
author: "Paige Contreras (A16850883)"
format: pdf
---

>Q1.

download the sequences and move them to working project directory

ran a blastp search against refseq protein and set the taxid to homo sapiens (taxid:9606)

-Official symbol: **ERBB2**
-official Full Name: **name**




```{r}
library(bio3d)
a <- read.fasta("A16850883_mutant_seq.fa")
```

```{r}
a$id
```

We can score conservation pre sequence position 

>Q2. 

```{r}
s <- conserv(a)
which( s != 1)
mutation_positions <- which(s != 1)
mutation_positions
```

```{r}
a$ali[, 824]
a$ali[, 861]
a$ali[, 899]
```
Answer:
N824V, I861E, F899Y



>Q3 We can use the HMMER at the EBI (if it works) to find this information
ERBB2
or we can use uniprot 



```{r}
ref_seq <- a$ali[a$id == "wt_healthy", ]
ref <- paste(ref_seq, collapse = "")
cat(ref)
```
